TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas 1944, byacing 2 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, metaq squ kawas 2007, 8 byacing ru 23 ryax hinqilan nya. 63 kawas qu qinnxan nya babaw rhzyal. hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay ega, ru mrhuw pgleng pzyangay ega, minkahul squ Kosowa, ko'ka nqu Arpania. hmzinas 60 msyaw qu kinnalay nya ega, mnaki squ qnxan na pkabalay ega aring squ kawas 1966 ru mucing 1980. kawas 1997 Begolli mwah sa Kosowa, pcbaq raygakuse p'ega; pzyang pucing knalay nya ega ga yaqu kawas te 2006, iy pucing spzyangay nya ega uzi ga kawas 2008, ru kyapun nag an ru wayal mhuqil squ 2007 la. qsuzyan nya Adil Begolli ga, mrhuw squliq ka pkbalay kamok na Telibi ru ega. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~…ē ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, metaq s~…ēqu kawas~…ē ****, * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ru ** rjax ńßinqilan nja. ** kawas~…ē qu qinnxan nja ő≤aő≤aw rńßzjal. ńßija …£a s~…ēquliq ka pzjaŇčaj e…£a, ru mrńßuw p…£leŇč pzjaŇčaj e…£a, minkańßul s~…ēqu kos~…ēowa, ko Ēka nqu arpania. ńßmzinas~…ē ** ms~…ējaw qu kinnalaj nja e…£a, mnaki s~…ēqu qnxan na pkaő≤alaj e…£a ariŇč s~…ēqu kawas~…ē **** ru mu ¶~ ®iŇč ****. kawas~…ē **** ő≤e…£olli mwańß s~…ēa kos~…ēowa, p ¶~ ®ő≤aq raj…£akus~…ēe p Ēe…£a; pzjaŇč pu ¶~ ®iŇč knalaj nja e…£a …£a jaqu kawas~…ē te ****, ij pu ¶~ ®iŇč s~…ēpzjaŇčaj nja e…£a uzi …£a kawas~…ē ****, ru kjapun na…£ an ru wajal mńßuqil s~…ēqu **** la. qs~…ēuzjan nja a*il ő≤e…£olli …£a, mrńßuw s~…ēquliq ka pkő≤alaj kamok na teliő≤i ru e…£a. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: kawas 1944, byacing 2 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, metaq squ kawas 2007, 8 byacing ru 23 ryax hinqilan nya. 63 kawas qu qinnxan nya babaw rhzyal. hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay ega, ru mrhuw pgleng pzyangay ega, minkahul squ Kosowa, ko'ka nqu Arpania. hmzinas 60 msyaw qu kinnalay nya ega, mnaki squ qnxan na pkabalay ega aring squ kawas 1966 ru mucing 1980. kawas 1997 Begolli mwah sa Kosowa, pcbaq raygakuse p'ega; pzyang pucing knalay nya ega ga yaqu kawas te 2006, iy pucing spzyangay nya ega uzi ga kawas 2008, ru kyapun nag an ru wayal mhuqil squ 2007 la. qsuzyan nya Adil Begolli ga, mrhuw squliq ka pkbalay kamok na Telibi ru ega. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
